title: AI assistant for vendor invoice triage
problem_statement: The accounts payable team receives thousands of vendor invoices through email. Manual checks for missing PO details, duplicate invoices, and tax mismatches delay approvals. We need an AI-assisted workflow that reads invoices, identifies exceptions, routes clean cases, and flags risky cases for review.
expected_impact: Reduce manual invoice triage effort by 55 percent and improve exception visibility before month-end close.
constraints: Use dummy invoice data for demo. Must show audit trail and human approval for exceptions.
optional_skills: Document AI, RAG, workflow automation, compliance

title: Demand forecasting quick win for retail stockouts
problem_statement: Regional planners still use spreadsheets to identify stockout risk. They want a quick AI prototype that combines sales history, promotion calendar, and weather signals to highlight stores likely to run out of high-demand SKUs next week.
expected_impact: Prevent avoidable stockouts in pilot stores and reduce planner analysis time.
constraints: Prototype only. Data is synthetic for hackathon. No production integration required.

title: Voice-enabled knowledge support for field engineers
problem_statement: Field engineers call senior experts when troubleshooting equipment issues. We need a voice-friendly assistant that can answer from service manuals, collect incident context, and suggest next steps while preserving a transcript for audit.
expected_impact: Reduce expert escalations and improve first-time resolution for common field incidents.
constraints: Must avoid customer IP in demo. Voice is preferred but not mandatory for MVP.
optional_skills: RAG, Live API, voice, field service
